name: Moss
description: A leaf-like creature that can glide through the wind effortlessly with its leaf-like features. A jack of all trades, who enjoys learning everything it can around it.

name: Scoots
description: A ball-like creature who's just happy to roll around and chase after their friends, quite often running into walls. Has quite the hard shell, making for good bonks!

name: Slick
description: A hedgehog-bear-like creature who is very slick and greedy. Will stop at nothing to earn a little gold to add to its collection. They are also one lucky duck.
